title: Data Quality CLI
description: Build a multi-file CSV profiling tool.

files.README.md:
# Data Quality CLI

Profile CSV files for missing values and duplicates.
files.tests/test_profiler.py:
from data_quality.profiler import profile_rows

def test_profile_rows():
    rows=[{'id':'1','name':'A'},{'id':'1','name':'A'},{'id':'2','name':''}]
    result=profile_rows(rows)
    assert result['missing']==1
    assert result['duplicates']==1
